# Stock Picking Auto Create Package

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:3cf5f00f68ce2a8065e164d399b08079ef3b6a0c311517ccfb57aac2dd71659b
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to create automatically a package on picking validation in
order to help adding information about delivery tracking.

You can choose to create a single package or a package per product packaging.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

Enable on the Operation type by choosing a mode.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20stock_picking_auto_create_package%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_auto_create_package.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._auto_create_delivery_package_filter
documentation: Filter move lines that can be put in pack

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_auto_create_package.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._auto_create_delivery_package_per_smallest_packaging
documentation: Put each done smallest product packaging in a package

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_auto_create_package.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._auto_create_delivery_package_single
documentation: For every move that don't have a package, set a new one.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_auto_create_package.tests.test_automatic_package.TestAutomaticPackage.test_automatic_no
documentation:
Disable the automatic package creation
Create a picking, fill in quantities and validate it
The move line should not contain a package

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_auto_create_package.tests.test_automatic_package.TestAutomaticPackage.test_automatic_single
documentation:
Enable the automatic package creation with mode "single"
Create a picking, fill in quantities and validate it
The move line should contain a package

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_auto_create_package.tests.test_automatic_package.TestAutomaticPackage.test_automatic_packaging
documentation:
Enable the automatic package creation with mode "packaging"
Create a picking, fill in quantities and validate it
The move line should contain a package per product packaging
